name: Triple Chocolate and Vanilla Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Finely crushed creme-filled chocolate sandwich cookies (about 18 cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Combine the cookie crumbs and margarine; press firmly into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
5. Add the eggs, flour, and vanilla extract; mix well.
6. Divide the batter in half.
7. To one half of the batter, add the melted semi-sweet chocolate and mix well.
8. Pour the chocolate-laced batter into the prepared pan.
9. Evenly pour the remaining vanilla batter over the top.
10. Bake for 50 minutes or until the center springs back when lightly touched.
11. Cool completely.
12. Top with Chocolate Glaze and refrigerate leftovers.
Chocolate Glaze:
1. In a small saucepan, melt the semi-sweet chocolate and whipping cream over low heat.
2. Cook and stir until thickened and smooth.
3. Remove from heat and spread over the cooled cheesecake.
